metadata.name: Test the IT Disaster Recovery Plan

description: An IT auditor reviews the results of the latest disaster recovery (DR) test.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the DR test plan and the after-action report from the most recent test.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has the documentation detailing the plan and results of the DR test.

nodes.task_description: Review the test results to determine if the Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) were met.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds that the RTO of 4 hours was missed; the actual recovery took 7 hours.

nodes.task_description: Document the failure to meet the RTO as a finding and recommend a root cause analysis be performed by the IT team.

expected_outcome.value: A finding is created to address the DR test failure.
